title: Ramp Union Live Stream
body: A midnight ramp briefing becomes a live stream with better lighting than your investor deck.

labor.grievance: ramp live stream made coordination public

title: Safety Audit Redlines
body: The audit team leaves redlines so dense the binder looks injured.

regulators.grievance: audit redlines turned the binder into evidence

title: Hail Holdover Gridlock
body: Weather did the opening act; thin staffing, brittle gates, and heroic denial handle the encore.

title: Liquidity Whisper Chain
body: One nervous lender call becomes three market rumors and a spreadsheet no one admits to forwarding.

creditors.grievance: liquidity whisper chain pulled lenders into formation

title: Committee Calendar Notice
body: A hearing placeholder lands on the public calendar before counsel has finished pretending this is routine.

title: Anonymous Dropbox Ping
body: A reporter confirms receipt of files named with the sort of precision only an exhausted insider uses.

title: Supplier Credit Hold
body: A parts vendor discovers the power of saying no before the airline discovers the power of needing parts.

title: Stranded Passenger Clip
body: A gate-area video turns a route cancellation into the nation's least relaxing civics lesson.

title: Crew App Dead Zone
body: The crew app stops syncing and briefly makes everyone nostalgic for paper chaos.

title: Board Leak Countermemo
body: A director's anonymous memo denounces anonymous leaking with suspicious fluency.

title: Airport Slot Freeze
body: The airport authority calls the schedule unreliable, which is rude mostly because it is correct.

title: Fare Sale Refund Wave
body: The revenue team sells optimism at a discount and the refund desk receives the actual invoice.

title: Wildcat Bid Board
body: Crews start trading assignments like protest pamphlets, and the system obediently records the contempt.

title: Crew Base Lawsuit
body: The base closure complaint quotes your own transition FAQ with prosecutorial tenderness.

title: Union Safety Petition
body: Labor reframes the fight as passenger protection, which is inconvenient because the facts help.

title: Red-Tag Photo Dump
body: Maintenance photos arrive online with timestamps, tail numbers, and the company's preferred excuse already disproven.

title: Deferred Item Binder
body: The deferred-maintenance log proves that temporary was less a category than a management philosophy.

title: Tool Room Quarantine
body: An audit locks down a maintenance cage and discovers that inventory control had been mostly aspirational.

title: Tarmac Bus Apology Loop
body: Passengers tour the airport perimeter by bus while your apology email refreshes its own apology.

title: Storm Recovery Overtime Bill
body: Weather exposed the operation; overtime invoices politely itemize what leadership removed from the budget.

title: Airport Curfew Breach
body: A stranded bank of flights turns into fines, neighbor fury, and a municipal official with television makeup.

title: Cash Sweep Notice
body: The agent bank converts patience into math and math into a very short letter.

title: Liquidity Call Transcript
body: A creditor call leaks, and the word manageable reads differently with timestamps.

title: Payment Processor Holdback
body: The processor decides ticket revenue should spend a little time in custody before meeting the company.

title: Subpoena Metadata Snag
body: Counsel produces the files and accidentally produces the timeline hiding inside the files.

title: Hearing Chart Exhibit
body: A staff chart makes the whole strategy legible enough for cable news to understand it.

title: Remediation Deadline Receipt
body: The agency finds the promised corrective action in a calendar invite, not on the ramp.

title: Whistleblower Audio Cache
body: The leak includes audio, which is unfair only because the room sounds exactly like the minutes said it did not.

title: Documentary Teaser Drop
body: A streaming teaser compresses six quarters of governance failure into ninety seconds and one terrible freeze-frame.

title: Engine Vendor Stop-Ship
body: The engine vendor stops pretending exposure is collectible and starts pretending the phone is broken.

title: Caterer Counterclaim
body: The caterer sues for unpaid invoices and somehow becomes the most sympathetic party in aviation.

title: Crew Tracking Outage Report
body: The outage report explains that crews were not misplaced; the database merely held competing theories of reality.

title: Board Faction Shadow Vote
body: A director circulates a vote count before the meeting, which is technically not a coup if everyone can read email.
